title: KORBOND Sewing Pins - Professional Dressmaker Fabric Pins - 25g
features: With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s no. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting & clothes care tools and accessories
Smooth, tempered steel pins glide through the most delicate of fabrics without risk of snagging or pulling
Ideal for hemming, marking, pinning garments, tailoring, Quilting, flower arranging, poppy pins, general sewing, crafting and household tasks
Easy alternative to safety pins and sewing clips – an essential part of every sewing and craft box
description: From the manufacturer Korbond Care & Repair Professional Dressmaking Pins 25g Korbond Dressmaker Pins are suitable for a multitude of dressmaking tasks, soft furnishing projects and general sewing jobs. With extra strong metal shafts to withstand the thickest of materials they are excellent for dressmakers and home sewer alike. Contents Include: 25g extra fine dressmaker pins Handy Usages For Korbond Care & Repair Professional Dressmaking Pins Versatile Perfect for pinning and all types of material; leather, denim, cotton, satin, silk, stretch fabrics and knitwear. Sewing machine Dressmaking pins can be stitched over with a sewing machine when pinned to fabric horizontally. Pinning a poppy or corsage A discreet and secure way to pin a poppy or corsage to clothing, or pin a handkerchief to the inside of a suit pocket. Floral designs Use Dressmaking Pins to secure leaves, foliage and flower heads together to create a colourful boutonniere, or to keep multiple stems in place before binding a bouquet.
